listSubtitle: Money owed to your household — loans, deposits in transit, outstanding refunds.
emptyBody: Create your first receivable to start tracking month-end balances owed to you.
deleteRowDescription: {{name}} will be hidden from lists and reports. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
deleteDetailDescription: Snapshots and history will be hidden. This can be undone via the database, not yet via the UI.
createDescription: Track money owed to your household — loans you've made, deposits you're due back, refunds in transit.
editDescription: Currency is not editable — create a new receivable if it needs to change. Ownership is editable.
snapshotsEmpty: No snapshots yet. Click "New snapshot" to record this month's outstanding balance.
